chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-295 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A. 1618/2022. 3. For hearing of main case 10.08.2022 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing when last chance was given. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
